title: Distant Raze
description: A well equipped modpack to run Minecraft with Distant Horizon and other necessary mods that pleases the eye. Offers the best performance among all the modpacks.
body:
# **Distant Raze**

## The Ultimate Modpack with DH, to get into the world of Minecraft

This modpack features the following mods, that are necessary for it to look good:
- Distant Horizons (8 Gb of ram is recommended to eliminate stutters. Set it inside the settings of the modpack.)
- Bliss Shader or any other shader that is supported by DH. (currently Bliss works the most, I recommend that)
- Falling Leaves
- First-person Model
- Vanilla Refresh
- Visuality
- Physics mod
- Other performance related mods, the best among all the modpacks.

  [On a horizon of a village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed13e0de2185d5ffa36bcf46514cc6c4fe0a869f.jpeg)
